scripts.docker:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml wait db redis 2>/dev/null || sleep 5
scripts.api: fuser -k 8000/tcp 2>/dev/null; docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d; sleep 3; cd apps/api && .venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
